item.description: President Donald Trump used his prime-time speech Thursday to raise questions about election integrity in the build-up to November’s key midterms while reviving false claims about the 2020 election and asserting that China targeted his campaign. NBC’s Gabe Gutierrez reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Trump Uses Prime-Time Speech to Revive False Election Claims
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump used his prime-time speech Thursday to raise questions about election integrity in the build-up to November’s key midterms while reviving false claims about the 2020 election and asserting that China targeted his campaign. NBC’s Gabe Gutierrez reports for TODAY.

item.title: Trump Uses Prime-Time Speech to Revive False Election Claims

item.description: President Trump accused China of having a role in influencing the 2020 election during his speech about election interference. NBC News' Garrett Haake has more on how this could impact China's relationship with the U.S.

media:content.media:title: How Trump's election allegations against China could impact relations with U.S.
media:content.media:description: President Trump accused China of having a role in influencing the 2020 election during his speech about election interference. NBC News' Garrett Haake has more on how this could impact China's relationship with the U.S.

item.title: How Trump's election allegations against China could impact relations with U.S.

item.description: The Food and Drug Administration is investigating a potential connection to iceberg lettuce supplied to Taco Bell by produce giant Taylor Farms as the possible source of the cyclosporiasis outbreak that has sickened thousands across 34 states. The fast-food giant is announcing a voluntary recall of some potentially impacted lettuce from its restaurants. NBC’s Anne Thompson reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Taylor Farms Lettuce at Taco Bell Linked to Stomach Bug Outbreak
media:content.media:description: The Food and Drug Administration is investigating a potential connection to iceberg lettuce supplied to Taco Bell by produce giant Taylor Farms as the possible source of the cyclosporiasis outbreak that has sickened thousands across 34 states. The fast-food giant is announcing a voluntary recall of some potentially impacted lettuce from its restaurants. NBC’s Anne Thompson reports for TODAY.

item.title: Taylor Farms Lettuce at Taco Bell Linked to Stomach Bug Outbreak

item.description: Bridges were severely damaged in Iran after the U.S. military said it completed its sixth consecutive night of strikes against the country. CENTCOM said in a statement posted on X that it targeted “coastal surveillance and air defense sites, military logistics infrastructure, and maritime capabilities.”

media:content.media:title: Iranian bridges severely damaged after sixth night of U.S. strikes
media:content.media:description: Bridges were severely damaged in Iran after the U.S. military said it completed its sixth consecutive night of strikes against the country. CENTCOM said in a statement posted on X that it targeted “coastal surveillance and air defense sites, military logistics infrastructure, and maritime capabilities.”

item.title: Iranian bridges severely damaged after sixth night of U.S. strikes

item.description: Maine Democratic Senate candidates Nirav Shah, Shenna Bellows, Jordan Wood and Troy Jackson discuss which ideas from Graham Platner's platform they would use if they are chosen as the nominee.

media:content.media:title: Maine Democratic Senate candidates discuss which of Platner's ideas they would use
media:content.media:description: Maine Democratic Senate candidates Nirav Shah, Shenna Bellows, Jordan Wood and Troy Jackson discuss which ideas from Graham Platner's platform they would use if they are chosen as the nominee.

item.title: Maine Democratic Senate candidates discuss which of Platner's ideas they would use

item.dc:creator: Albinson Linares
item.description: Hundreds of people came to pay their last respects to the Mexican father of three who worked in construction and had lived in the U.S. for 35 years.

media:content.media:text: Public Viewing And Funeral Held For ICE Shooting Victim Lorenzo Salgado Araujo
media:content.media:description: People gather outside the Forest Park Lawndale funeral home during the public viewing of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo on Friday in Houston, Texas.

media:content.media:text: Lorenzo Salgado Araujo.
media:content.media:description: People gather outside the Forest Park Lawndale funeral home during the public viewing of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo on Friday in Houston, Texas.

media:content.media:text: Ronaldo Salgado
media:content.media:description: People gather outside the Forest Park Lawndale funeral home during the public viewing of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo on Friday in Houston, Texas.

media:content.media:text: People embrace as they pay their respects to Lorenzo Salgado Araujo during a candlelight vigil on July 08, 2026 in Houston, Texas.
media:content.media:description: People gather outside the Forest Park Lawndale funeral home during the public viewing of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo on Friday in Houston, Texas.

item.title: Anguish and disbelief at wake for Lorenzo Salgado Araujo, killed by ICE in Houston

item.description: As the 2026 FIFA World Cup gets set to wrap up, NBC's chief data analyst Steve Kornacki joins TODAY to break down the matchup between Argentina and Spain. He weighs in on Spain as the favorite, riding a 37-game unbeaten streak into the match. Then, Martha Stewart’s grandson and World Cup superfan, Truman, stops by to discuss his spot-on predictions.

media:content.media:title: Steve Kornacki Breaks Down World Cup Final Match
media:content.media:description: As the 2026 FIFA World Cup gets set to wrap up, NBC's chief data analyst Steve Kornacki joins TODAY to break down the matchup between Argentina and Spain. He weighs in on Spain as the favorite, riding a 37-game unbeaten streak into the match. Then, Martha Stewart’s grandson and World Cup superfan, Truman, stops by to discuss his spot-on predictions.

item.title: Steve Kornacki Breaks Down World Cup Final Match

item.dc:creator: Ben Kamisar
Bridget Bowman
item.description: Nebraska Democratic Senate nominee Cindy Burbank has submitted a letter requesting her name be removed from the ballot, a move that would set up a one-on-one matchup between Republican Sen.

media:content.media:text: Cindy Burbank.
media:content.media:description: Cindy Burbank.

item.title: Democrat moves to drop out of Nebraska’s Senate race, clearing the path for an independent

item.dc:creator: Alexandra Marquez
item.description: Trump backed Sen. Darline Graham, R-S.C., in the special election to fill her late brother’s Senate seat for a full term.

media:content.media:text: Darline Graham Nordone places her hand on a bible and raises the other as she's sworn in, her husband stands next to her, and Chuck Grassley holds the bible as well standing across from her
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump backed Sen. Darline Graham to run for a full term to replace her late brother, Lindsey Graham, as the Republican nominee for Senate in South Carolina.

item.title: Trump backs Sen. Darline Graham in primary to replace her late brother

item.dc:creator: David K. Li
item.description: Donike “”Donna” Gocaj, who fell into the 10-foot manhole full of scalding steam, suffered “unfathomable” pain, her family said in the suit.

media:content.media:text: Manhole cover at a crime scene.
media:content.media:description: A 56-year-old woman died after she fell into an uncovered manhole near East 52nd Street and Fifth Avenue in New York on May 19.

item.title: Family of woman who died after falling into uncovered NYC manhole files lawsuit

item.dc:creator: Rebecca Shabad
item.description: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin on Friday threatened state election officials.

media:content.media:text: Markwayne Mullin.
media:content.media:description: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin speaks during a news conference Friday in Washington.

item.title: DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin threatens states over elections after Trump speech

item.dc:creator: Mark Hodge
item.description: Spain vs. Argentina. Lamine Yamal vs. Lionel Messi.

media:content.media:text: Lionel Messi (C) of Argentina is challenged by Anthony
media:content.media:description: Lionel Messi of Argentina is challenged by Anthony Gordon and Reece James of England during the FIFA World Cup 2026 semi final football match between England and Argentina on Wednesday.

media:content.media:text: Rodri #16 of Spain
media:content.media:description: Lionel Messi of Argentina is challenged by Anthony Gordon and Reece James of England during the FIFA World Cup 2026 semi final football match between England and Argentina on Wednesday.

media:content.media:text: France v Spain: Semi Final - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: Lionel Messi of Argentina is challenged by Anthony Gordon and Reece James of England during the FIFA World Cup 2026 semi final football match between England and Argentina on Wednesday.

item.title: From The Sports Desk: A blockbuster World Cup Final

item.dc:creator: Adam Edelman
item.description: Wisconsin Lt. Gov. Sara Rodriguez said Friday that she was dropping out of the governor’s race, just days after her campaign discovered major inaccuracies related to its financial reporting.

media:content.media:text: Governor candidate Sara Rodriguez
media:content.media:description: Lt. Gov. Sara Rodriguez had been seen as one of the leading candidates in a crowded Democratic primary field for Wisconsin governor.

item.title: Wisconsin Lt. Gov. Sara Rodriguez drops out of the governor’s race

item.dc:creator: Minyvonne Burke
item.description: Video posted on social media showed two plainclothes Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents appearing to handcuff a man at a Las Vegas airport while he screamed in terror.

media:content.media:text: Harry Reid International Airport In Las Vegas
media:content.media:description: The departure area at Las Vegas' Harry Reid International Airport on Jan. 10, 2025.

item.title: ICE agents in plainclothes handcuff man at Las Vegas airport, shocking onlookers

item.dc:creator: Tom Winter
Daniel Arkin
item.description: The man who allegedly breached security and shouted a racial slur at “TODAY” co-anchor Craig Melvin was arraigned on hate crime charges Friday.

media:content.media:text: Craig Melvin.
media:content.media:description: Craig Melvin in 2024.

item.title: ‘TODAY’ show intruder arraigned on hate crime charges

item.dc:creator: Deanna Pai
item.description: Prime members can get three months of Standard Audible for free. The member-exclusive deal also includes $20 in credits to spend on titles.

media:content.media:text: Audible is one of our favorite platforms for streaming audiobooks and has millions of titles.
media:content.media:description: Audible is one of our favorite platforms for streaming audiobooks and has millions of titles.

media:content.media:text: Audible is one of our favorite platforms for streaming audiobooks and has millions of titles.
media:content.media:description: Audible is one of our favorite platforms for streaming audiobooks and has millions of titles.

item.title: Amazon is offering free months of Audible — but only for Prime members

item.dc:creator: Cory Fernandez
item.description: I talked to entomology experts to find the best products for preventing ticks on humans during prime tick season, including socks and sprays.

media:content.media:text: You can prevent tick bites by being diligent about protection and using the right products.
media:content.media:description: You can prevent tick bites by being diligent about protection and using the right products.

media:content.media:text: You can prevent tick bites by being diligent about protection and using the right products.
media:content.media:description: You can prevent tick bites by being diligent about protection and using the right products.

item.title: These are the best products to help keep ticks off of you

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: Experts share tips and tricks to save money on your air conditioning bill, especially during the hot summer months and heat waves.

media:content.media:text: According to experts, minor home improvements can lower your air conditioning bill and keep your house cooler.
media:content.media:description: According to experts, minor home improvements can lower your air conditioning bill and keep your house cooler.

media:content.media:text: According to experts, minor home improvements can lower your air conditioning bill and keep your house cooler.
media:content.media:description: According to experts, minor home improvements can lower your air conditioning bill and keep your house cooler.

item.title: How to lower your air conditioning bill, according to experts

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
item.description: What’s the healthiest wet and dry kitten food? Vets recommend options from Purina, Iams, Fancy Feast and more, and explain how much to feed kittens.

media:content.media:text: Ideally, kittens should eat a mix of wet and dry food daily since each type offers different health benefits.
media:content.media:description: Ideally, kittens should eat a mix of wet and dry food daily since each type offers different health benefits.

media:content.media:text: Ideally, kittens should eat a mix of wet and dry food daily since each type offers different health benefits.
media:content.media:description: Ideally, kittens should eat a mix of wet and dry food daily since each type offers different health benefits.

item.title: The best foods for hungry, growing kittens, according to vets

item.dc:creator: Rebecca Cohen
Austin Mullen
item.description: Weeks after a 76-year-old woman was killed when a Tesla, operating on Full Self-Driving, crashed into her Texas home, the National Transportation Safety Board concluded that the car’s driver overrode the driver assistance mode and accelerated into the building.

media:content.media:text: Tesla crash.
media:content.media:description: The aftermath of the crash into Martha Avila's home last month.

media:content.media:text: Tesla crash gif.
media:content.media:description: The aftermath of the crash into Martha Avila's home last month.

item.title: Tesla driver whose car slammed into home overrode driver assistance mode, NTSB says

item.dc:creator: Sophie Ziedalski
Maggie McCabe
item.description: A historic hub for free speech and protest is under the spotlight as the Trump administration proposes adding permanent fencing around Lafayette Square.

media:content.media:text: Trump Military Parade
media:content.media:description: The proposal is the latest in a series efforts by the Trump administration to reshape prominent landmarks in Washington.

item.title: Federal panel signals it could support permanent fencing around White House park known for protests

item.dc:creator: Alexandra Marquez
item.description: Trump backed Sen. Darline Graham, R-S.C., in the special election to fill her late brother’s Senate seat for a full term.

media:content.media:text: Darline Graham Nordone places her hand on a bible and raises the other as she's sworn in, her husband stands next to her, and Chuck Grassley holds the bible as well standing across from her
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump backed Sen. Darline Graham to run for a full term to replace her late brother, Lindsey Graham, as the Republican nominee for Senate in South Carolina.

item.title: Trump backs Sen. Darline Graham in primary to replace her late brother
